name: Kado
description: On-ramp and off-ramp API for fiat-to-crypto conversion with embedded widget and SDK.

seo.title: Kado — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Kado: On-ramp and off-ramp API for fiat-to-crypto conversion with embedded widget and SDK.

when_to_use: Embedded fiat-to-crypto on-ramp widget for Web3 app user onboarding
Off-ramp for crypto wallet users converting assets back to bank account
KYC-managed crypto conversion API for fintech and wallet developers
Custom-branded crypto buy/sell flow via Kado SDK for consumer apps

pros: Simple widget embed for on/off-ramp flows
Covers both ramps through one SDK
cons: Smaller coverage than Moonpay or Transak
Limited payment methods in some regions
review.verdict: Lightweight ramp SDK worth testing for crypto apps that want simpler fees than incumbent aggregators.
review.best_for: Crypto wallets and dApps wanting an embeddable ramp with fair fees
review.not_for: Teams needing broadest country and chain coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
